sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_numbers (value1 DOUBLE, value2 DOUBLE, value3 TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_numbers (value1, value2, value3) VALUES (1.5, -2.3, '5'), (NULL, 7.0, '10'), (3.9, -8.1, 'INVALID'), (-2.0, 0.0, '');
SELECT ABS(value1) + ABS(value2) AS total_abs_value FROM test_numbers;
SELECT ABS(AVG(value1)) + (INTERVAL 1 HOUR + INTERVAL 2 HOUR) AS adjusted_time FROM test_numbers;
WITH stats AS (SELECT ABS(value1) AS abs_val, value3 FROM test_numbers WHERE value3 IS NOT NULL) SELECT abs_val + ABS(COALESCE(NULL, -10)) FROM stats;
SELECT value3, ABS(MAX(value1 + NULL)) AS max_abs_value FROM test_numbers GROUP BY value3 HAVING max_abs_value > 0;
SELECT (ABS(value1) + COALESCE(value2, 0)) * 2 AS doubled_abs_value FROM test_numbers WHERE value3 = 'INVALID' ORDER BY doubled_abs_value;
SELECT value3, ABS(SUM(value1)) OVER (PARTITION BY value3) + INTERVAL 5 HOUR AS partitioned_time FROM test_numbers;
WITH temp AS (SELECT ABS(value1) AS abs_val FROM test_numbers) SELECT abs_val + INTERVAL (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_numbers) HOUR FROM temp;
CREATE TABLE more_data (start_time TIMESTAMP, duration INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO more_data (start_time, duration) VALUES ('2023-01-01 00:00:00', INTERVAL 1 HOUR), ('2023-02-02 12:00:00', INTERVAL -5 HOUR);
SELECT start_time + ABS(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM duration)) * INTERVAL '1 HOUR' AS adjusted_time FROM more_data WHERE start_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT ABS(value1) + ABS(COALESCE(value2, 0)) AS total FROM test_numbers WHERE value2 < 0;
